3224910.name: Nexus Station
3224910.description:
THIS IS OUR EARLY ACCESS WHICH HAS LIMITED CONTENT

Nexus station is still in early development and not yet feature-complete. We will be adding features and content to the game as we develop it further. By joining our Early Access, you help us as developers to check and validate some technical aspects, and gather feedback on our project.

A NEW KIND OF SOCIAL SANDBOX MMO

We are developing a one-of-a-kind cross-platform Social Sandbox MMO! In our free-to-play cross-platform game, you can create your own worlds, trade with friends, play official game modes to earn XP and progress through the season, and even have your worlds featured as official playable content for the community. With so much more to come, we look forward to sharing more with you as the game develops.

BUILD WORLDS WITH LEVEL EDITOR

Create and edit your own worlds and explore the worlds made by your friends! We will choose player-made worlds to feature as official competitive and co-op features for the wider community. 

WANNA PLAY A DROP GAME?

Check out our latest game mode - be the last one standing to win! Survive for as long as you can by moving between the crumbling platforms. You only get one life so tread carefully!

COMPETE FOR YOUR BEST TIME IN PARKOUR

Race in our daily parkour worlds, or create your own parkour worlds for others to compete in.

WHATEVER YOU DO… DON’T DIE!

Avoid dying in a level filled with deadly hazards! The less you die, the higher you score. Play the ‘don’t die’ levels from the official portals, or check out ones made by your friends from the world finder.

COLLECT LIMITED ITEMS AND WEARABLES

Progress in Nexus Station with our season pass and get your hands on exclusive items that you won’t get anywhere else! Trade wearables with your friends to get the perfect set and customise your character in our dedicated customisation screen.

SHOOT THE HOOPS WITH YOUR FRIENDS

Work together to score as many points as you can in our shoot the hoops feature. Enter the portals from the Hub World to play the official hoops worlds and earn rewards.

BE A PART OF THE COMMUNITY

Join our online community on Discord and Instagram where you can get the latest updates on the game and hang out with the community. We also share sneak peeks of the game’s development so you can get hyped about what’s coming next!
